overall.description: First-person gameplay footage of a character walking along a narrow dirt trail through a forest at night. The character holds a wooden staff in their left hand for the first portion of the clip, illuminating the path with warm torchlight before lowering it out of view.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow forest trail illuminated by torchlight

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously along the dirt path at night while holding a wooden staff in the left hand to light the way

entered.detail: thick wooden pole held in the left hand, extending vertically along the left edge of the frame
narrow winding dirt trail with patches of grass and small rocks
tall grass and low vegetation flanking both sides of the trail
dark silhouette of trees forming the horizon against the night sky
vertical wooden post or marker stake on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow forest trail at night, holding a wooden staff that casts warm torchlight on the dirt path ahead. Tall grass lines both sides of the trail while a wooden stake marker becomes visible on the left as the character approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow forest trail illuminated by torchlight

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward along the path with the staff now lowered out of the camera's view

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the forest trail with the wooden staff no longer visible in the frame. The wooden stake marker on the left side of the path draws closer as the character advances along the illuminated dirt trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective moving along a narrow forest trail at night, transitioning from a guided walk with a torch to a steady advance into the darkness. It begins with the character holding a wooden staff that casts a warm, flickering glow across the dirt path and the tall grass lining the way. As the camera advances, the staff is lowered out of view, shifting the focus entirely to the illuminated trail ahead. The scene then draws closer to a wooden stake marker on the left side of the path, which becomes the central point of focus as the character continues their forward momentum through the woods.
